description: You are a Water Resource Specialist managing a consulting project. In the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' open in ProjectLibre, add a regulatory compliance note to the 'Security Audit' task (Task ID 11). The note must read exactly: "IMPORTANT: Requires compliance with EPA Section 404 Clean Water Act permitting. Submit water quality test results to state regulatory agency minimum 15 business days before audit date. Contact environmental compliance officer for current permit application forms." Export the updated project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/project_with_notes.xml.
